evidence.maximum_claim: A deterministic synthetic fixture ran under the exact recorded OCI engine, image, effective configuration, socket-denial profile, controls, export review, and cleanup evidence.

seven exact request-identity mutations were rejected before execution
timed_out=true, nonzero_status=true, process_count_before_termination=4, process_domain_stopped=true, delayed_deadline_elapsed=true, delayed_canary_absent=true
independent watchdog exact-ID removal and absence readback completed
schema-only parser accepted the sacrificial traversal candidate
unexpected regular, symlink, hardlink, FIFO, socket, device, oversize, traversal, and absolute cases were rejected

controls.expected: fixture, input, backend, image, argv, environment, and output identity mutations are rejected before execution
workspace write succeeds
omitted read-only root permits sacrificial outside-workspace writes
immutable, host, sibling, traversal, link, and device effects are denied
run-owned IPv4, IPv6, Unix, datagram, and proxy sensors exchange nonces
omitted socket profile permits run-owned loopback, IPv6, Unix, and datagram nonce paths
DNS transport, IPv4, IPv6, metadata, loopback, and Unix socket attempts are denied
safe environment exposes no secret or proxy key names while vulnerable control does
bounded normal child completes
without a prompt timeout, a double-forked delayed child produces its canary effect
forced timeout kills the complete container process domain
independent watchdog removes an exact immutable container after controller death
one bounded allowlisted patch is captured and digest reviewed
schema-only parsing accepts a sacrificial traversal candidate when path controls are omitted
absolute, traversal, and non-allowlisted special-file paths are rejected
post-review mutation changes the digest and is blocked
exact labelled resources are removed and verified absent
omitted cleanup leaves a sacrificial labelled container observable before exact removal
all run-labelled containers and temporary roots are absent
the exact embedded fixture emits attempted effects with non-empty sensor detail
a CONTROL_SIMULATION candidate can be constructed but is not admitted as enforcement
the core runtime-evidence admissibility rule rejects CONTROL_SIMULATION

cleanup.detail: explicit Docker label queries for containers/images/networks/volumes; host process, listener, and mount queries; controller-owned runtime-root enumeration

enforced: the exact Docker create configuration recorded in effective_policy
socket and socketpair creation denied by the recorded seccomp profile
no host bind mount, daemon socket, credential, or proxy environment was supplied
observed: the exact program-owned fixture observed permitted and denied effects
the deliberately vulnerable control observed the effects that safe controls deny
unknown: outer Colima VM, Docker daemon, Linux kernel, and runc integrity
hostile workload resistance beyond the exact deterministic fixture
excluded_claims: general-purpose safe execution of arbitrary repositories or credentials
portable enforcement on a different engine, image, architecture, or host
evidence_ceiling.maximum_claim: A deterministic synthetic fixture ran under the exact recorded OCI engine, image, effective configuration, socket-denial profile, controls, export review, and cleanup evidence.

limitations: the initial backend is experimental and is not registered as a normal product command
live tmpfs capture is limited to a controller-invoked ustar stream for the exact fixture; hostile archive generation beyond the exercised parser controls is not proved
